name: opportunities.crawl.runs.sweep
description: Every 2 minutes: re-drive resumable crawl_runs whose lease has lapsed — a crashed/redeployed owner, or a lost/backpressure-deferred continuation — by re-emitting a backpressure-gated continuation. The durable crawl_runs row is the source of truth, so even a dropped continuation converges. Runs past the stuck-attempt ceiling are failed (freeing the source's single-flight slot). Idempotent; safe to fire.
